case_title: RAUL VELASCO VS. CYPRESS CONTRACTING CORP. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF RAUL VALASCO RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELASCO, RAUL
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-30-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-19-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CYPRESS CONTRACTING CORP. BY THE COURT AT THE SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-30-2016 AT 10:00 AM AT THE REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF RAUL VELASCO. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-07-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF RAUL VELASCO. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JOSE MANUEL SANDATE. PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM. DEFENDANT JOSE MANUEL SANDATE'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED FOR DEC. 7, 2016 HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY VELASCO, RAUL AS TO DEFENDANT CYPRESS CONTRACTING CORP. SANDATE, JOSE MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00 SERVED JUN-24-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDATE, JOSE MANUEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF RAUL VELASCO TO OCT-19-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 IN ORDER TO AMEND HIS COMPLAINT TO INCLUDE HIS WIFE, TANIA AGRUELLES, AS AN ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF. AT PLAINTIRFF'S REQUEST, DEFENDANT CYPRESS CONTRACTING CORP. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE CORRECT SPELLING OF DEFENDANT JOSE MANUEL SANDATE'S NAME IS NOW REFLECTED IN THE COURT'S REGISTER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AS TO DEFENDANT SANDATE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO DEC. 7, 2016 AT 8:30. DEFENDANT, JOSE MANUEL SANDATE'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED FOR THE CONTINUED DATE AND WILL BE DISMISSED WHEN PLAINTIFF AMENDS THE COMPLAINT TO ADD A NEW DEFENDANT.
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
